troparion: (Tone 1) Let Your heart be touched, O our God,* by the sufferings the saints endured for You;* heal all our sorrows,* we beseech You, O lover of mankind.
prokimenon: It is good to give praise to the Lord,
to sing to Your name, O Most High.
To announce Your mercy in the morning and Your truth every night.
second_prokimenon: Robed is the Lord and girt about with strength.
